title: Lifesteal Tier Tagger
description: Lifesteal TierTagger is a lightweight mod that displays player tier rankings directly in-game based on the popular Lifesteal PvP tier lists.
body:
🩸 Lifesteal TierTagger
A lightweight client/server-side utility mod that displays tester‑assigned PvP tiers (HT/LT system) next to player names.
Designed for Lifesteal‑style servers, it helps players and staff instantly identify skill tiers without affecting gameplay.

⚔️ What This Mod Does
Lifesteal TierTagger adds visible tier labels to players based on an external testing system.
It does not assign or calculate tiers — it simply displays existing tier data in a clean, customizable way.

Players can see tiers in:

Nametags

This makes it ideal for competitive servers where player skill levels matter.

🏷️ Supported Tier System
HT1 → LT1 → HT2 → LT2 → HT3 → LT3 → HT4 → LT4 → HT5 → LT5

⭐ Key Features
🏷️ Tier Display
Shows HT/LT tiers next to player names

Works in nametags

Fully configurable formatting

👀 Real-Time Updates
Tier changes update instantly

Works seamlessly in multiplayer environments

⚡ Lightweight & Efficient
Minimal performance impact

Safe for large multiplayer servers

No gameplay changes — purely visual

🧠 How It Works
Your server or community assigns tiers externally (e.g., PvP testers).
This mod reads that data (via config or integration) and displays it in‑game.
It does not modify combat, stats, or player abilities.

🎮 Ideal Use Cases
Lifesteal SMP servers

PvP practice servers

Competitive or ranked communities

Events or tournaments using tier systems

Any server that uses HT/LT tester evaluations

⚠️ Important Notes
Not affiliated with any specific servere
